findings.title: promptfoo/promptfoo
findings.description: Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration.  Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.

findings.title: comet-ml/opik
findings.description: Debug, evaluate, and monitor your LLM applications, RAG systems, and agentic workflows with comprehensive tracing, automated evaluations, and production-ready dashboards.

findings.title: raga-ai-hub/RagaAI-Catalyst
findings.description: Python SDK for Agent AI Observability, Monitoring and Evaluation Framework. Includes features like agent, llm and tools tracing, debugging multi-agentic system, self-hosted dashboard and advanced analytics with timeline and execution graph view

findings.title: Tencent/WeKnora
findings.description: LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding, semantic retrieval, and context-aware answers using RAG paradigm.

findings.title: vibrantlabsai/ragas
findings.description: Supercharge Your LLM Application Evaluations 🚀

findings.title: dataelement/bisheng
findings.description: BISHENG is an open LLM devops platform for next generation Enterprise AI applications. Powerful and comprehensive features include: GenAI workflow, RAG, Agent, Unified model management, Evaluation, SFT, Dataset Management, Enterprise-level System Management, Observability and more.

findings.title: Kiln-AI/Kiln
findings.description: Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.

findings.title: Marker-Inc-Korea/AutoRAG
findings.description: AutoRAG: An Open-Source Framework for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Evaluation & Optimization with AutoML-Style Automation

findings.title: modelscope/evalscope
findings.description: A streamlined and customizable framework for efficient large model (LLM, VLM, AIGC) evaluation and performance benchmarking.

findings.title: beir-cellar/beir
findings.description: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Information Retrieval. Easy to use, evaluate your models across 15+ diverse IR datasets.

findings.title: 1517005260/graph-rag-agent
findings.description: 拼好RAG：手搓并融合了GraphRAG、LightRAG、Neo4j-llm-graph-builder进行知识图谱构建以及搜索；整合DeepSearch技术实现私域RAG的推理；自制针对GraphRAG的评估框架| Integrate GraphRAG, LightRAG, and Neo4j-llm-graph-builder for knowledge graph construction and search. Combine DeepSearch for private RAG reasoning. Create a custom evaluation framework for GraphRAG.

findings.title: Xnhyacinth/Awesome-LLM-Long-Context-Modeling
findings.description: 📰 Must-read papers and blogs on LLM based Long Context Modeling 🔥

findings.title: SmartFlowAI/EmoLLM
findings.description: 心理健康大模型 (LLM x Mental Health), Pre & Post-training & Dataset & Evaluation & Depoly & RAG,  with InternLM / Qwen / Baichuan / DeepSeek / Mixtral / LLama / GLM series models

findings.title: onestardao/WFGY
findings.description: WFGY is an open-source AI Troubleshooting Atlas for RAG, agents, and real-world AI workflows. Includes the 16-problem map, Global Debug Card, and WFGY 4.0. ⭐ Star to help more builders find this repo.

findings.title: deepsense-ai/ragbits
findings.description: Building blocks for rapid development of GenAI applications

findings.title: EmbeddedLLM/JamAIBase
findings.description: The collaborative spreadsheet for AI. Chain cells into powerful pipelines, experiment with prompts and models, and evaluate LLM responses in real-time. Work together seamlessly to build and iterate on AI applications.

findings.title: Raudaschl/rag-fusion
findings.description: RAG-Fusion: multi-query generation + Reciprocal Rank Fusion for better retrieval-augmented generation. Includes evaluation harness with NFCorpus/BEIR.

findings.title: IntelLabs/RAG-FiT
findings.description: Framework for enhancing LLMs for RAG tasks using fine-tuning.

findings.title: Azure-Samples/contoso-chat
findings.description: This sample has the full End2End process of creating RAG application with Prompty and Azure AI Foundry. It includes GPT-4 LLM application code, evaluations, deployment automation with AZD CLI, GitHub actions for evaluation and deployment and intent mapping for multiple LLM task mapping.

findings.title: stanford-futuredata/ARES
findings.description: Automated Evaluation of RAG Systems
